name: Los Horóscopos de Durango
description:
'''Los Horóscopos de Durango''' is a [[Mexican-American]] group who perform [[Regional Mexican music]]. The ensemble was founded in [[Chicago|Chicago, Illinois]], in the mid-1970s, as a [[Grupera|Grupero]] band, but over time expanded into [[Duranguense]] and [[Banda music|Banda Sinaloense]]. Their live performances became a mixture of both Duranguense and Sinaloan Banda styles, characterized by brass instruments, synthesizer, and upbeat dance rhythms. Los Horóscopos had international hits with "[[Antes muerta que sencilla|Antes Muertas que Sencillas]]", "[[Dos Locos]]", and "Si La Quieres".

The band won a [[Billboard Latin Music Awards|''Billboard'' Latin Music Awards]] for their impact on [[Regional Mexican music]].
